name: roshan-harf-mcp
description: Self-hostable MCP server for Roshan AI's Harf (حرف) Persian speech service: transcription (ASR), forced alignment, real-time streaming, and speaker verification/identification/diarization/indexing. Supports many named, self-hosted Harf instances.

environment_variables.name: ROSHAN_HARF__DEFAULT_INSTANCE
environment_variables.description: Name of the Harf instance used when a tool call omits 'instance'.

environment_variables.name: ROSHAN_HARF__INSTANCES__<NAME>__BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Base URL for Harf instance <NAME> (default https://harf.roshan-ai.ir).

environment_variables.name: ROSHAN_HARF__INSTANCES__<NAME>__TOKEN
environment_variables.description: API token for Harf instance <NAME> (sent as 'Authorization: Token <token>').

environment_variables.name: ROSHAN_HARF__INSTANCES__<NAME>__VERIFY_SSL
environment_variables.description: Whether to verify TLS certificates for instance <NAME> (default true).

environment_variables.name: ROSHAN_HARF__INSTANCES__<NAME>__TIMEOUT
environment_variables.description: Per-request timeout in seconds for instance <NAME> (default 60).

environment_variables.name: ROSHAN_HARF_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Shorthand: base URL for the synthesized 'default' instance.

environment_variables.name: ROSHAN_HARF_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Shorthand: API token for the synthesized 'default' instance.

tools.name: harf_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe Persian audio/video by URL (sync, or async returning task_ids).

tools.name: harf_transcribe_upload
tools.description: Transcribe a local audio/video file via multipart upload.

tools.name: harf_transcription_status
tools.description: Poll the state of async transcription tasks (PENDING/FAILURE/TIMEOUT).

tools.name: harf_align
tools.description: Force-align a known transcript to its audio for per-segment timestamps.

tools.name: harf_live_transcribe
tools.description: Stream a local WAV file over a WebSocket for real-time transcription.

tools.name: harf_live_info
tools.description: Describe the Harf live (WebSocket) streaming protocol.

tools.name: harf_speaker_verification
tools.description: Verify whether a speaker matches reference audio (threshold 0.65).

tools.name: harf_speaker_identification
tools.description: Identify which known speaker a probe most resembles.

tools.name: harf_speaker_diarization
tools.description: Segment audio by speaker ('who spoke when') with text per segment.

tools.name: harf_speaker_indexing
tools.description: Label timestamped, transcribed segments with known speakers.

tools.name: healthcheck
tools.description: Check that a Harf instance is up and ready.

tools.name: list_instances
tools.description: List configured Harf instances (names + base URLs only).

tools.name: roshan_harf_docs
tools.description: Built-in offline catalog/documentation for Harf and these tools.
